rnds.name: Rede Nacional de Dados em Saúde
rnds.description: Brazil's national health data network built on FHIR R4. Centralizes health records for 210M+ citizens.

auth.method: OAuth2 + Digital Certificate (e-CPF or e-CNPJ ICP-Brasil)
auth.certificateType: A1 or A3 ICP-Brasil certificate (issued by AC accredited by ITI)

rateLimits.note: Rate limits vary by establishment size and CNES registration

supportedResources.note: Search by CNS (Cartão Nacional de Saúde) — 15-digit identifier
CNES (Cadastro Nacional de Estabelecimentos de Saúde) — 7-digit code
Primary submission method — POST a Bundle containing encounter + observations

exampleRequest.description: Submit a clinical encounter to RNDS

errorCodes.403: CNES not authorized for this operation
errorCodes.404: Patient CNS not found in CADWEB

credentialingProcess: 1. Register establishment in SCPA (Sistema de Controle de Permissão de Acesso) at servicos-datasus.saude.gov.br
2. Obtain e-CNPJ digital certificate (ICP-Brasil A1 or A3)
3. Register software system in RNDS portal
4. Complete homologation tests against sandbox environment
5. Request production access after successful homologation

esus.name: e-SUS Atenção Primária (e-SUS APS)
esus.description: Brazil's primary care electronic health system managed by DESF (Department of Family Health). Mandatory for all UBS (basic health units).
esus.dataExportFormat: LEDI-AB (Layout e-SUS APS de Dados e Interface)
esus.reportingSystem: SISAB (Sistema de Informação em Saúde para a Atenção Básica)
esus.integration_approach: e-SUS uses Apache Thrift (not REST/FHIR) for data exchange. For HoliLabs, the recommended approach is to generate LEDI-AB compliant data exports that can be imported into e-SUS PEC (Prontuário Eletrônico do Cidadão).
esus.reportingPeriods: Monthly. Data must be submitted by the 10th of the following month. Late submissions affect municipal health financing (PAB Fixo/Variável).

sigtap.name: SIGTAP — Sistema de Gerenciamento da Tabela de Procedimentos do SUS
sigtap.description: SUS procedure code table (public healthcare). Different from TUSS (private healthcare).
sigtap.relationship: SIGTAP codes are used for SUS billing. TUSS codes are used for private/supplementary insurance. HoliLabs needs both for clinics that serve both populations.

cns.name: Cartão Nacional de Saúde
cns.note: Every Brazilian citizen has a CNS. Required for RNDS and SUS interactions.

cpf.name: Cadastro de Pessoas Físicas
cpf.note: Primary tax/civil identifier. Used as secondary health identifier.

cnes.name: Cadastro Nacional de Estabelecimentos de Saúde
cnes.note: Every healthcare establishment (clinic, hospital, lab) has a CNES.

rips.name: RIPS — Registro Individual de Prestación de Servicios de Salud
rips.description: Colombia's individual health service reporting system. As of Resolution 2275/2023, RIPS are submitted in JSON format as mandatory support for FEV (Factura Electrónica de Venta en Salud).
rips.currentRegulation: Resolución 2275 de 2023 — Ministerio de Salud y Protección Social
rips.format: JSON (replaces legacy .txt flat files as of Dec 2023)

auth.method: Digital certificate (DIAN-issued) + SOAP web service auth
auth.note: Authentication through SISPRO portal credentials + electronic invoicing certificate

dataStructure.description: Resolution 2275/2023 replaced the old AC/AF/AP/AT/AU/US flat file structure with JSON datasets

newFormat.transaccion: Billing entity info, FEV number, note type
newFormat.usuarios: Patient identification, affiliation data, municipality codes
newFormat.consulta: Medical/dental consultation data, CUPS codes, diagnosis (CIE-10), purpose
newFormat.procedimientos: Procedure data, CUPS codes, surgical act, scope

cupsMapping.note: CUPS (Clasificación Única de Procedimientos en Salud) is Colombia's procedure code system. Similar to TUSS in Brazil.

commonCodes.description: Consulta de primera vez por medicina general
Consulta de control por medicina general

errorCodes.003: Código CUPS no encontrado en tabla de referencia
errorCodes.005: Número de identificación no corresponde con BDUA

bdua.name: BDUA — Base de Datos Única de Afiliados
bdua.description: Colombia's unified affiliation database. Verify patient insurance status before billing.

fhirIg.name: Colombia Core FHIR IG
fhirIg.note: Early-stage FHIR IG for Colombia. Not yet mandatory but MinSalud is moving toward FHIR adoption.
